title: selago psammophila
intro: Selago psammophila, also known as the sand selaginella, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to Southern Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago psammophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
